deliverables: at least one public migration case study
at least two external reference deployments or downstream repositories
external-proof catalog entries linked from canonical docs
clear runtime and package-manager expectation framing before adoption
validated non-primary adoption paths before public support claims expand
comparative benchmark reports for hydration growth
comparative benchmark reports for invalidation-heavy resource pressure
comparative benchmark reports for rollback-heavy mutation pressure
release-facing metric summaries grounded in repeatable evidence
broader editor integration reach beyond the current local contract baseline
clear third-party integration docs for AI and diagnostics workflows
external ecosystem references that prove integration without tribal knowledge

rule: these gaps are not closed by repo-local maturity alone; they require externally legible proof or broader ecosystem execution
